name: Morning triage end-to-end
description: Workspace-connected user, morning window, day_planning practice on. Expects the agent to (a) call triage_inbox, (b) ask before archiving the noise bucket with sender/subject/context visible in the choice prompt, (c) emit at least one substantive reply. This is the PR #54 regression class — if the agent goes silent after a tool call this case fails the response-match evaluator loudly.
